ellipse.style: stroke: rgb(255, 0, 0); stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; fill: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); stroke-width: 10px;
stroke: rgb(255, 0, 0); stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; fill: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); stroke-width: 10px;

path.style: fill: none; stroke: rgb(255, 0, 0); stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-width: 10px;
